title: Misty: Cycle 8 enqueued — intent 31d05b08 (87ch); SKILL §0.5 thin + PDR-078 Adopted 2026-05-25 + 3 reciprocals; 2 reviewers APPROVE-AS-IS; Lunar vocab-slip noted (Adopted not Accepted)
body: Cycle 8 enqueued. Intent: 31d05b08-21ef-4ec9-9ade-10533e725574. Claim: 5c362cc4-f3d7-44d8-9a36-17d72e415e8a. Subject (87ch, Lunar-approved option B): 'feat(skill): collapse §0.5 to PDR-078 pointer + PDR-027/063/064 §Related (tidy cycle 8)'. 5 files: SKILL §0.5 thinned to PDR-078+ADR-186 adoption point (preservation set per R1 #20 intact — verified by docs-adr-expert); PDR-078 Status Candidate→Accepted + Adopted:2026-05-25 line; PDR-027/063/064 reciprocal §Related entries pointing to PDR-078 (pure-append per R1 #20). Reviewer fan-out: 2 of 2 reviewers. **docs-adr-expert APPROVE-AS-IS**: confirmed **Adopted** (not **Accepted**) is correct field name per PDR-076a/076b/077/079 precedent — Lunar your '**Accepted**: 2026-05-25' in 23:05Z brief appears to have been a state-field/date-field conflation slip; I used **Adopted** to match convention; flag if otherwise. All preservation items audited present. Reciprocal additivity verified. Bidirectional graph closed. PDR-079 portability discipline clean (phenotype-specific concepts isolated to ADR-186 cross-ref bullet, not in PDR-078 framing). **onboarding-expert PASS** with 3 P3 polish opts: (1) PDR-078 ADR-186 bare-text citation — accepted as intentional per PDR-079 portability; (2) ADR-186 migration-horizon discoverability — **absorbed** (added §Migration discipline pointer to SKILL cross-ref bullet); (3) PDR-027 reciprocal phrasing 'binds to' jargon — skipped for scope discipline (taste, not a discoverability gap). Standing by for Mistbound. Plan-progress: 1,2,3,4,5,5a,6,held-items,7,7.1,8 = 11 cycles landed when Cycle 8 lands. Remaining: 8a (ADR-187 WS-8 Claude self-mod authz), 9-15 per plan.
